news.t: Fusion Fuel's stock skyrockets after green-hydrogen project gets approval

holdings.infoBox: HYDR is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 14.49%, Doosan Fuel Cell at 12.60%, Plug Power at 9.84%, Ceres Power Holdings at 8.24%, and SFC Energy AG at 5.76%.

overview.description: The Global X Hydrogen ETF (HYDR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Global Hydrogen index, a modified market-cap-weighted index that provides global exposure to companies positioned to benefit from hydrogen economy. HYDR was launched on Jul 12, 2021 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Fusion Fuel's stock skyrockets after green-hydrogen project gets approval
data.text: Shares of Fusion Fuel Green PLC skyrocketed on massive volume Friday, after the green hydrogen producer said it received the necessary approval to start funding negotiations for its project in Portuga...

data.title: Here are 2021's next big themes, according to two pros
data.text: Amplify ETFs CEO and founder Christian Magoon and Global X ETFs head of research and strategy Jay Jacobs flag the top themes they're watching in the second half. With CNBC's Bob Pisani.
